name: DripConnector
description: Connects to the Drip v2 REST API for email marketing automation: Subscribers, Campaigns, Workflows, Events, Orders, Tags, Custom Fields, Broadcasts, and Forms. Auth via HTTP Basic with the Drip API key (api_key as Basic-auth username, empty password).

install_fields.label: Drip API Key
install_fields.help: From Drip → Account → User Settings → API Token. Sent as the username of an HTTP Basic auth pair (password empty). Treat as a password — grants full account access.

install_fields.label: Drip Account ID
install_fields.help: Numeric account id from Drip → Settings → General Info (or the URL prefix at app.getdrip.com/{id}/). Appended to base_url automatically.

install_fields.label: Drip API Base URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the Drip REST API. The account_id is appended automatically. Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum Drip API requests per minute. Drip's standard limit is 3,600/min per account.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates api_key + account_id and round-trips GET /campaigns to confirm credentials. Returns ConnectorStatus.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Drip API connectivity by calling GET /campaigns.

apis.name: List Subscribers
apis.description: GET /subscribers — list with optional status, paging, date-range and tag filters.

apis.name: Get Subscriber
apis.description: GET /subscribers/{id_or_email} — fetch a single subscriber by Drip ID or URL-encoded email.

apis.name: Create or Update Subscriber
apis.description: POST /subscribers — Drip dedupes on email. Body wrapped in {subscribers:[…]} envelope.

apis.name: Delete Subscriber
apis.description: DELETE /subscribers/{id_or_email} — permanently delete a subscriber.

apis.name: List Campaigns
apis.description: GET /campaigns — list email campaigns filtered by status.

apis.name: Get Campaign
apis.description: GET /campaigns/{id} — fetch a single campaign.

apis.name: Subscribe to Campaign
apis.description: POST /campaigns/{id}/subscribers — subscribe an email to a Drip campaign, optionally double-opt-in.

apis.name: List Workflows
apis.description: GET /workflows — list all Drip workflows.

apis.name: Trigger Workflow
apis.description: POST /workflows/{id}/subscribers — start a workflow for a subscriber by email.

apis.name: Record Custom Event
apis.description: POST /events — record a custom event tied to a subscriber email. Body wrapped in {events:[…]} envelope.

apis.name: List Orders
apis.description: GET /orders — list orders.

apis.name: Create Order
apis.description: POST /orders — create an order in Drip (triggers Ecommerce automations). Body wrapped in {orders:[…]}.

apis.name: List Tags
apis.description: GET /tags — list all tags defined in the Drip account.

apis.name: Apply Tag
apis.description: POST /tags — apply a tag to a subscriber by email. Body wrapped in {tags:[{email,tag}]}.

apis.name: Remove Tag
apis.description: DELETE /subscribers/{email}/tags/{tag} — remove a tag from a subscriber.

apis.name: List Custom Fields
apis.description: GET /custom_field_identifiers — list custom field keys defined in the account.

apis.name: List Broadcasts
apis.description: GET /broadcasts — list email broadcasts filtered by status.

apis.name: List Forms
apis.description: GET /forms — list email-capture forms.
